claims.evidence: src/renderer.js draw(state): whole body wrapped in try/catch (never throws), getContext() returns null on missing document/canvas, only reads state fields (player/aliens/bullets/shields/ufo/score/lives) via drawRect/drawAliens/etc, never assigns into state — read-only.

src/audio.js: getContext() lazily builds AudioContext guarded by try/catch (single console.error on construction failure, then triedInit silences further attempts), playTone() checks c.state === 'suspended'/'closed' and wraps oscillator setup in try/catch, resume() try/catches c.resume() with a .catch(noop) — no path throws.

src/main.js: top-level `if (typeof window === 'undefined' || typeof document === 'undefined') return;` no-ops under Node; boot() calls SI.Game.init(), sets window.gameState = window.SI.Game.state once (live reference, never reassigned again), addEventListener('keydown'/'keyup') writes SI.Game.input.left/right/fire, and calls window.SI.Loop.start().

src/loop.js: fpsSamples ring buffer (FPS_WINDOW_SIZE=30 in config.js) of 1000/rawDeltaMs instantaneous samples, non-positive deltas skipped (pushFpsSample guard), medianFps() sorts and picks middle/avg-of-two -> always finite positive (defaults to 60 with zero samples); state.fps = medianFps() set every frame in frame(). eval/result.json shows passedGate:true, testPassRate:1 for the sealed P5 median>=50 fps check.

src/game.js retains move/shoot/kill (player.js/bullet.js/collision.js), march (alien.js marchInterval), lives/gameover (state.state='gameover' at update() top-of-function, before line 393), and waves/shields/UFO (shield.js, ufo.js, ALIEN_MARCH_WAVE_SPEEDUP in config.js) unchanged from prior slices; eval/result.json reports testPassRate:1, mutationScore:1, hackFindings:[] for the full P1-P5 sealed suite.

claims.text: main.js also wires a one-shot audio-unlock: first keydown calls SI.Audio.resume() via resumeAudioOnce(), addressing the browser autoplay-gesture requirement beyond what the intent claims spell out.

src/config.js centralizes all renderer colors/dims/HUD font and FPS_WINDOW_SIZE as named constants (no magic numbers in renderer.js/loop.js), and renderer.js draws a score/lives/wave HUD plus a GAME OVER/YOU WIN overlay text not mentioned in the intent claims.

renderer.js alien row-based tiered coloring (RENDER_ALIEN_COLOR_HIGH/MID/LOW by row) and per-cell shield damage alpha (RENDER_SHIELD_DAMAGED_ALPHA_STEP) are visual polish beyond the bare draw contract.
